title: cardamine microphylla subsp. blaisdellii
intro: Cardamine microphylla subsp. blaisdellii, also known as Blaisdell's bittercress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its small white flowers and pungent leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cardamine microphylla subsp. blaisdellii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
